name: is_activity
description: TRUE if activity_or_facility holds activities, FALSE if it holds facilities (FacilityUse/IndividualFacilityUse/Slot)

name: activity_or_facility
description: JSON array of activity labels (or facility types for FacilityUse/IndividualFacilityUse/Slot)

name: organization_names
description: JSON array of distinct organization_name values for the group

name: nhstrust_name
description: NHS Trust name (TrustName) resolved from opportunity location via 000-location-nhstrusts.geojson; NULL when outside any trust

name: nhstrust_code
description: NHS Trust code (TrustCd) for the same trust as nhstrust_name
